meaning: adj.无带的,无背带的,无吊带的
examples: This is no metaphor, here is the strapless watch.
Strapless ball gowns and miniskirts were popular – among the women, of course.
The guys were wearing black tuxes like Keith and the girls were wearing light pink strapless dresses.
In the same vein, Ms. Acra generally avoids strapless dresses in the spring and summer.
As the guests admired Linda in her strapless bridal gown, he was the alpha male.
